title: LLM Model Info
description: Information about a loaded LLM model including capabilities and parameters
documentation:
## Purpose
Describes a loaded LLM's structural properties and capabilities, including vocabulary size, maximum context length, embedding dimensions, and feature flags such as chat template and tool-use support.

## When to use
Retrieve this type when a cap or orchestrator needs to know model capabilities before issuing a generation request. It is the response to a `get_info` request in a [LLM Generation Request](https://capdag.com/browse/media:llm-generation-request;json;record).

## Notes
The `model_spec` and `vocab_size` fields are required. All other fields are optional and may be absent if the model file does not expose the corresponding metadata. Callers should treat missing fields as unknown rather than assuming a default value.

context_length.description: Maximum context length the model supports

supports_chat.description: Whether the model has a chat template

supports_tools.description: Whether the model supports tool use
